title: Dragon Fighter
review_summary: The reviewer enjoys sci-fi horror films but finds this one lacking compared to classics like Alien or Jurassic Park; despite decent special effects on a monster created by cloning technology inspired by dinosaurs (direct-to-video), the movie disappoints overall due to underwhelming character development. Dean Cain is praised for his performance in an otherwise mediocre film that doesn't meet high expectations set by other genre staples.
